flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Pima Community College fell 49% between 2007 and 2010 (26.7% → 13.5%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at Pima Community College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (21.4% vs 29.8%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Pima Community College rose 136% between 2009 and 2010 (3.3% → 7.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Pima Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.9% → 0.0%).
